name: openrouter-rate-limiter
description: Production-ready OpenRouter rate limiter for Node.js, CLIs and automation workflows.
author: mlinaresweb

scripts.pack:dry: npm run clean && npm run check && npm run test && npm run build && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.pack:local: npm run clean && npm run check && npm run test && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.release:check: npm run clean && npm run check && npm run test && npm run build && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.publish:dry: npm run release:check && npm publish --dry-run --access public
scripts.publish:public: npm run release:check && npm publish --access public
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run check && npm run test && npm run build
